Placement Process

Comprehensive training and support from pre-placement to job offer

1

Pre-Placement Training

Aptitude, technical, and soft skills training

2

Resume Building

Professional resume preparation and review

3

Mock Interviews

Practice sessions with industry experts

4

Campus Drives

On-campus recruitment by top companies

5

Job Offers

Offer letters and onboarding support

Training Programs

Aptitude Training

  • • Quantitative Aptitude
  • • Logical Reasoning
  • • Verbal Ability
  • • Data Interpretation

Technical Training

  • • Programming Languages
  • • Data Structures
  • • Database Management
  • • Industry Tools

Soft Skills

  • • Communication Skills
  • • Group Discussions
  • • Interview Techniques
  • • Personality Development

For Recruiters

Partner with Jerusalem College of Engineering to recruit talented engineers. Our students are trained in the latest technologies and industry best practices.
